name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Self-contained sequential app workflow plugin for concise app rules, exact user-message evidence, research waves, approved plan microtasks, dev-stage functional graphs, task ledgers, packet contracts, role-matched handoffs, and lineage audits.

interface.shortDescription: Exact constitution, evidence, research, plan, graph, dev, and audit workflow.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides a self-contained application workflow: a concise app constitution with only populated typed records and required sources, optional immutable excerpts from user messages, research that verifies capabilities and gaps, approved sequential plan microtasks, a dev-stage functional graph, graph-linked task ledgers, versioned handoff packets, role-matched handoffs, read-only instruction hardening, and exact lineage audits. Inferences stop at research until confirmed. The plugin artifacts do not depend on a host workspace instruction file, runtime service, role inventory, or validation script.
capabilities: Research waves mapped to constitution ids
Dev-stage functional graph from approved plan microtasks
Implementation analysis with exact broken links
defaultPrompt: Write only exact typed constitution records and every required source.
Verify capabilities and gaps in research before planning.
Model plan microtasks in the graph and analyze lineage.
